product_entrypoints.note: This is the main public search form used by the header/hero/mobile surfaces.
This route is only used for structured, high-intent queries that the client router sends to /search.

product_entrypoints.function: useEffect -> getExploreRows(normalizedQuery, sortMode, exactSetCode, exactReleaseYear, exactIllustrator)
product_entrypoints.note: This is the live ranked results loader for /explore and is separate from /search route resolution.

request_path_summary.path_relationship: publicSearchResolver.ts and getExploreRows.ts remain separate surfaces, but the collapsed client path now treats /explore as the authoritative results surface. /search is reserved for direct-resolution candidates that are likely to terminate on card/set redirects.
request_path_summary.bootstrap_note: ExplorePageClient is a client component, so real browser use includes client navigation and bootstrap before the getExploreRows server call. This audit measures server/request path behavior only, not browser hydration time.
